err_generic_fallback: Something went wrong. Please try again.
err_validation_request_envelope_invalid: The app sent a malformed request. Please try again.
err_dev_mode_disabled: This developer feature is turned off.
err_equipment_duplicate: This equipment is already in your library.
err_equipment_not_found: That equipment could not be found.
err_internal_database: Couldn't reach the local database. Please try again.
err_internal_audit: Couldn't record this action to the history log. Please try again.
err_internal_data: Some stored data couldn't be read. Please try again.
err_firstrun_incomplete: Finish the initial setup before using this feature.
err_path_already_registered_different_ki: This directory is registered under a different category
err_path_not_directory: This path is not a directory
err_path_permission_denied: Cannot read this directory — check permissions
err_path_reserved_name: That name is reserved by the operating system. Choose another.
err_path_traversal: That path points outside the allowed location.
err_path_collision: A file or folder with that name already exists here.
err_inbox_item_not_found: That inbox item could not be found.
err_inbox_has_open_plan: This item already has an open plan. Review or cancel it first.
err_inbox_item_no_plan: There's no plan for this item yet.
err_inbox_no_destination_root: Choose a destination library before continuing.
err_inbox_destination_root_required: A destination library is required for this move.
err_inbox_missing_path_attributes: This item is missing the details needed to plan a move.
err_classification_ambiguous: This file could be more than one type — confirm how to classify it.
err_classification_stale: This classification is out of date. Re-scan to refresh it.
err_pattern_unset: No naming pattern is set yet.
err_pattern_empty: The naming pattern can't be empty.
err_pattern_invalid_unicode: The naming pattern contains characters that aren't allowed.
err_token_unknown: The pattern uses a token that isn't recognised.
err_file_not_found: That file could not be found.
err_note_content_too_large: This note is too long. Please shorten it.
err_session_not_found: That session could not be found.
err_session_mixed_state: This selection mixes sessions in different states.
err_plan_approval_required: Approve the plan before applying it.
err_plan_approval_stale: The plan changed since you reviewed it. Review it again.
err_plan_invalid_state: This plan can't be used in its current state.
err_plan_not_found: That plan could not be found.
err_plan_not_in_apply: This plan isn't being applied right now.
err_plan_blocked_by_protection: This plan is blocked by a protected item. Resolve the protection first.
err_plan_items_empty: This plan has no items to apply.
err_item_not_failed: This item hasn't failed, so it can't be retried.
err_item_not_found: That item could not be found.
err_item_not_pending: This item is no longer pending.
err_run_not_found: That run could not be found.
err_no_items_to_retry: There are no items to retry.
err_parent_not_found: The parent item could not be found.
err_parent_not_terminal: The parent isn't in a final state yet.
err_lifecycle_read_only: This item is read-only and can't be changed.
err_lifecycle_last_confirmed_source: You can't remove the last confirmed source.
err_project_not_found: That project could not be found.
err_project_read_only: This project is read-only and can't be changed.
err_view_mixed_kind: This selection mixes different kinds of items.
err_view_not_found: That view could not be found.
err_view_unsupported_kind: This kind of item isn't supported here.
err_name_duplicate: That name is already in use.
err_source_not_found: That source could not be found.
err_source_invalid_organization_state: This source isn't in a state that allows that change.
err_filesystem_destination_exists: Something already exists at the destination.
err_transition_refused: That change isn't allowed right now.
err_plan_required: This action needs a plan first.
err_alias_duplicate: That alias already exists for this target.
err_alias_not_found: That alias could not be found.
err_target_not_found: That target could not be found.
err_macos_quarantine_detected: macOS has quarantined this app. Approve it in System Settings, then try again.
err_picker_unavailable: The file picker isn't available right now.
err_path_write_denied: Couldn't write to that location — check permissions.
err_database_error: Couldn't read from the local database. Please try again.
err_serialise_error: Couldn't prepare the data for export. Please try again.
err_io_error: A file read/write error occurred. Please try again.
shell_error_body: Something failed to render. Reload the view, or restart the app if it keeps happening.
cmdk_no_results: No results for "{query}". Try a different search term.
settings_datasources_empty: No source folders registered yet. Add one above.
settings_advanced_danger_desc: Resets all UI preferences (theme, density, font size) to defaults. Library roots, equipment, and session data are not affected.
settings_attribution_note: PlateVault identifies targets using the following astronomical data sources. We gratefully acknowledge their work.
settings_auditlog_page_count: {count} event{count, plural, one {} other {s}} · page {page} of {total}
settings_calmatch_sensor_temp_aria: Sensor temperature tolerance in degrees Celsius
settings_calmatch_dark_bias_age_aria: Dark and bias age limit in days
settings_calmatch_help: Toggle a field off to exclude it from matching (e.g. ignore gain). Soft/warn fields never block a match — they only lower confidence.
settings_cleanup_pertype_desc: Protected categories are set to a destructive action: {types}. These are costly to reacquire — confirm this is intentional.
settings_ingestion_hashing_eager: Eager — hash every file on first scan
settings_naming_warn_no_path_sep: No path separator (/) — all tokens resolve to one flat folder.
settings_naming_auto_apply: Auto-apply pattern to new projects without confirmation
